name: Boofers
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, mix together the tofu, parsley, salt, and pepper with the mashed potatoes.
4. Form the mixture into 12 patties, each about half an inch thick.
5. Heat 2 tablespoons oil in a skillet over medium heat.
6. Brown the patties for about 4 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Per patty: Calories 83; Protein 3 g; Fat 4 g; Carbs 8 g
